AICARDMOD-PRAY_CARD.title: Prayer
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.title: Devotion
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.description:
Gain 1 Devotion.
(Gain 1 Piety at the start of each turn.)
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.upgraded_descrip:
Gain 2 Devotion.
(Gain 2 Piety at the start of each turn.)
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.title: AI Oracle
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.description: Name your desire. The AI grants exactly what you ask — if it is too powerful, a price must be paid.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.upgraded_description: Name your desire. The AI grants exactly what you ask — if it is too powerful, a price must be paid.
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.title: Oracle  —  Name Your Desire
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.instructions:
What effect do you want? (e.g. "80 block", "draw 3 cards", "2 strength")
If the request is too powerful, the AI will add a penalty to balance it.
